title: Greeting Calculator
description: Asks your name and age, then tells you something fun.

files.name: main.py
files.content:
# title: Greeting Calculator
# description: Asks your name and age, then tells you something fun.

name = input("What's your name? ")
age  = int(input("How old are you? "))
print(f"Hi {name}! In 10 years you'll be {age + 10}.")
